# nVent TRACHTE

**Category:** Modular / Prefabricated, Power Infrastructure, Containerized Data Centers
**Website:** https://www.nvent.com/en-us/trachte

## Headline
Engineered building and enclosure manufacturer spanning modular data centers, E-houses, and large electrical equipment enclosures.

## Overview
nVent TRACHTE is a strong fit where modular buildings, electrical enclosures, and engineered housings intersect. It helps fill in the industrialized-building side of the supplier map rather than only the obvious IT or colocation layer.

## Key capabilities
- engineered building solutions
- modular enclosures and E-houses
- electrical equipment housing systems

## Best fit for
- buyers needing packaged infrastructure buildings
- power-focused deployment teams
- projects where enclosure engineering is part of the delivery path
